emailJobs.subject: CTO | Kijani Platforms
emailJobs.body:
Dear Avery Walker,

I am reaching out regarding the CTO opportunity at Kijani Platforms.

Based on your focus in FinTech, I believe my background aligns with your current needs.

Relevant summary:
Founder and engineer focused on production-ready automation, Stripe deployment flows, and measurable operational improvements.

If helpful, I would welcome a brief discussion on how I can contribute to your Technical Founder priorities.

Sincerely,
Barney R. Gilliom

products.name: Deployment & Stripe Automation Center
products.description: Flat rate $79/month for client access and subscription operations.

products.description: Starter $29/month, Pro $79/month, annual billing approximately 20% off.

products.description: Tier anchors: $12/$35/$120 monthly, localized with VAT in supported regions.

products.description: $4/month (pricing page currently unavailable in production URL).

products.name: EastBridge Ops Intelligence
